SEARCH
Module jtamaro
Package jtamaro.graphic

Class Text

java.lang.Object
jtamaro.graphic.Graphic
jtamaro.graphic.Text
public final class Text extends Graphic
A graphic with the text rendered using the specified font, size and color.

>When the indicated True-Type Font is not found in the system, a very basilar font that is always available is used instead. The resulting graphic has the minimal size that still fits the whole text.

The pinning position is horizontally aligned on the left and vertically on the baseline of the text.

  • Constructor Details

    • Text

      public Text(String content, String font, double size, Color color)
      Default constructor.
      Parameters:
      content - text to render
      font - the font to be used to render the text
      size - size in typographic points (e.g., 16)
      color - color to be used to fill the text
